arts.ttl: Fulham vs Arsenal Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Arsenal make the trip across the capital to take on Fulham in the Premier League this afternoon. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-ups for...

arts.ttl: Arteta: Stoke comparison is a compliment for Arsenal
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has said comparisons of his Arsenal team with Tony Pulis ’s Stoke City in the 2010s are a compliment - but added that he wants his players to be "kings of everything", as well as set-pieces. Arsenal have scored the most Premier League goals from corners since the start of last season, and this prowess has led to them being compared to Pulis’s Stoke side, who netted 43.1 per cent of their league goals (81 of 188) between 2008 and 2013 from set-pieces (excluding penalties).

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea enter race to sign Real Madrid defensive target
arts.sum: Real Madrid will almost certainly look to sign at least one central defender in 2025, but given that David Alaba and Antonio Rudiger are both over 30, it is entirely possible that an extra player is also brought in – more specifically, a younger option like Vitor Reis, who has already been linked in recent […] The post Arsenal and Chelsea enter race to sign Real Madrid defensive target appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Arsenal out to achieve English football history after equalling 87-year-old Man City record
arts.sum: Arsenal could achieve a feat never achieved by an English top-flight team before when they pit their wits against Fulham in Sunday's Premier League derby.

arts.ttl: Talks held: Arsenal & Man United receive info on striker who’s keen on Premier League transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United have been among the clubs to hold talks with the entourage of Lille striker Jonathan David, who is eyeing up a move to the Premier League. The Canada international is nearing the end of his contract with Lille, and looks set to become a free agent at the end of the […] The post Talks held: Arsenal & Man United receive info on striker who’s keen on Premier League transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes big Arsenal transfer decision as enquiries made for defender
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is reportedly ready to keep hold of Jakub Kiwior despite enquiries being made for the Polish defender ahead of January. Kiwior has largely impressed whenever he’s been involved in Arteta’s first-team, but playing time has been hard to come by due to there being so much competition for places at the […] The post Mikel Arteta makes big Arsenal transfer decision as enquiries made for defender appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal goalkeeper Neto explains last-gasp transfer and details David Raya relationship
arts.sum: Neto made three appearances for Bournemouth earlier this season before sealing a dramatic loan switch to Arsenal on transfer deadline day - now the 35-year-old veteran has opened up on the unexpected switch as part of a community visit to a local primary school in Islington

arts.ttl: Silva on Arsenal's set-pieces, Iwobi's form and 'emotional' Smith Rowe
arts.sum: Fulham boss Marco Silva sits down exclusively with Sky Sports to discuss how his side will deal with Arsenal's set-pieces, Alex Iwobi's "incredible form" and Emile Smith Rowe's "emotional" first time facing his former side.

arts.ttl: Arteta blocks Arsenal transfer as Liverpool and United eye bargain Bayern deal
arts.sum: football.london says: "I can understand why Mikel Arteta would want to keep Jakub Kiwior, but the Arsenal boss has done himself no favours. Davies will soon be available to sign on a free transfer, and TBR Football claim that the two Premier League clubs view a deal as 'too good to ignore'.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could shift away from previous transfer strategy by rivalling Chelsea for Brazilian star
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are reportedly both interested in a potential transfer move for Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis, according to Florian Plettenberg. The talented 18-year-old looks like the latest exciting prospect to emerge at Palmeiras after the recent success of fellow wonderkids Endrick and Estevao Willian.
